channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Azzi Fudd’s big third quarter leads Dallas Wings to win over New York Liberty
item.description: Azzi Fudd delivered a standout performance to help the Dallas Wings secure a 91-76 victory over the New York Liberty on Sunday, highlighted by a dominant third quarter that shifted the momentum of the...

item.title: Journalist claims health damage after alleged energy-weapon attacks linked to Epstein reporting
item.description: Veteran journalist Alisa Valdes-Rodriguez has publicly claimed that she has suffered lasting health damage following what she describes as targeted “direct energy weapon” attacks. According to her sta...

item.title: Six Bengaluru police personnel suspended after security lapse during PM Modi convoy route inspection
item.description: Six police personnel, including a sub-inspector, have been suspended in Bengaluru following a reported security lapse during Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s visit to the Art of Living Foundation campus...

item.title: Agusan del Sur officially prepares to host Palarong Pambansa 2026 after decades-long bid
item.description: Agusan del Sur has finally achieved its long-time goal of hosting the Palarong Pambansa 2026, marking a historic milestone for the province after more than three decades of aspiration. The article hig...

item.title: Scaling up kerbside EV charging in Australia: ensuring a fast, fair and practical rollout
item.description: Electric vehicle adoption in Australia is accelerating as petrol prices remain high and federal incentives continue, creating urgent demand for supporting charging infrastructure. While fast and ultra...

item.title: Trump seeks broader Middle East normalisation deals alongside proposed Iran agreement
item.description: US President Donald Trump reportedly used a phone call with several Muslim and Middle Eastern leaders to promote a broader diplomatic strategy tied to a proposed peace agreement with Iran. According t...

item.title: A Collection of Early 1900s Art Nouveau Exhibition Posters
item.description: The article explores a curated collection of 40 vintage exhibition posters from the early 1900s, a period widely recognized as the Golden Age of Art Nouveau. During this era, graphic design and decora...

item.title: Researchers Identify Superconducting Gap and Electron Coupling in Nickelate Superconductors
item.description: Researchers in China have made a significant advance in understanding high-temperature superconductivity by studying nickelate materials, one of the newest families of superconductors. The study focus...

item.title: Danny Cipriani and AnnaLynne McCord seen together in Los Angeles after announcing their engagement
item.description: Danny Cipriani and actress AnnaLynne McCord have been seen together in public for the first time since announcing their engagement, enjoying a relaxed outing at a farmers’ market in Los Angeles. The c...

item.title: Opinion Article Criticizes U.S. Claims About Cuba as Justification for Possible Military Escalation
item.description: The article is an opinion piece by Caitlin Johnstone arguing that recent statements by U.S. officials about Cuba represent an attempt to justify future military or political escalation against the cou...

item.title: Lehohla lecture reflects on Sisulu legacy and rural development gaps in Eastern Cape
item.description: The article reports on a reflective lecture delivered at the University of the Witwatersrand focusing on the legacy of anti-apartheid struggle icons Walter and Albertina Sisulu. Dr Pali Lehohla uses w...

item.title: Anne Hathaway discloses decade-long vision impairment in one eye
item.description: Hollywood actress Anne Hathaway has revealed that she experienced significant vision impairment in one eye for a period of 10 years, during which she was considered “legally blind” in that eye. The di...

item.title: RAF aircraft carrying UK Defence Secretary experiences GPS jamming near Russian border
item.description: An RAF jet transporting the UK Defence Secretary, John Healey, encountered GPS signal jamming while flying near the Russian border earlier this week. The incident occurred on Thursday as Healey was re...

item.title: Demand surges for Alex Newhook jerseys as Canadiens playoff success boosts Habs excitement in St. John’s
item.description: Interest in St. John’s-born NHL player Alex Newhook has surged across Newfoundland and Labrador following his standout performance with the Montreal Canadiens in the Stanley Cup playoffs. After Newhoo...

item.title: Sydney Opera House CEO discusses venue use and repair costs following TISM performances
item.description: Sydney Opera House chief executive Louise Herron has reflected on recent operational and maintenance challenges following a series of performances by alternative rock group TISM in the Concert Hall. T...

item.title: Philippine Health Secretary's Election as World Health Assembly President: Turning Global Role into Domestic Health Reforms
item.description: Dr. Teodoro Herbosa, the Philippine Secretary of Health, was elected president of the 78th World Health Assembly in 2025, marking a rare moment where a sitting Philippine health official holds a key p...

item.title: Erling Haaland Wins Premier League Golden Boot After Scoring 27 Goals for Manchester City
item.description: Erling Haaland has once again established himself as one of the most dangerous strikers in English football after finishing as the top scorer in the English Premier League. The Norwegian forward score...

item.title: Opinion Essay Argues Supreme Court Voting Rights Decisions Are Deepening Political Divisions
item.description: The article, originally published by Common Dreams and republished by Raw Story, argues that the current U.S. Supreme Court under Chief Justice John Roberts has intensified political and social divisi...

item.title: Cruise travellers can explore Chongqing’s rivers, pandas and historic attractions
item.description: This travel feature outlines what cruise passengers can expect when visiting Chongqing, one of China’s largest and fastest-growing cities. The article explains that most Yangtze River cruises between ...

item.title: Trump Administration Accused of Weakening CFTC Oversight of Prediction Markets
item.description: A report published by The New York Times and highlighted by Raw Story alleges that the Trump administration has reshaped the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) in ways that favor online predi...
